overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia departing a wooden forest campsite at night. The character walks along a muddy trail through dense, dark pine woods illuminated by moonlight and the warm glow of a distant campfire, eventually drawing his sword as he prepares for combat.

events.description: character turns left away from the campfire and begins walking into the forest

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns away from the lit hut and walks into the dark forest path, leaving the campsite behind

entered.detail: small rustic cabin with warm orange firelight glowing from the doorway
burning fire providing the primary light source near the hut entrance
muddy forest path leading from the campsite into the dense woods
tall dark evergreen trees surrounding the clearing

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a wooden forest campsite at night, with a small hut and campfire glowing warmly on the right. Geralt stands facing away from the camera, then turns left and begins walking along the dirt trail into the dark woods, leaving the shelter of the campsite behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail between dense pines

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the narrow forest trail, navigating past wooden debris and dense vegetation

entered.detail: broken wooden fence and debris alongside the muddy path
decayed timber and forest detritus scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: Having left the campsite, the camera follows Geralt along a narrow, winding dirt trail enclosed by dense pine forest. The warm firelight fades to cool moonlight as wooden debris and fallen logs appear along the left side of the path, with tall trees now flanking both sides of the trail.

events.description: character draws silver sword and raises arm, entering combat stance

agents.ego_description: Geralt suddenly draws his weapon and raises it, preparing to engage an unseen threat ahead on the path

entered.detail: another wooden structure barely visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: As Geralt proceeds deeper into the forest, he passes the wooden debris and approaches a more open area where another distant structure becomes visible through the trees. At the end of the segment, he abruptly draws his silver sword and raises it high, transitioning from exploration to combat readiness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm safety of a forest campsite into the oppressive darkness of a moonlit pine forest. It begins at a wooden shelter where a campfire glows warmly on the right, following Geralt as he turns away from the light to venture down a dirt trail. As he moves deeper into the woods, the warm firelight fades into cool moonlight, and the path narrows, flanked by towering trees and scattered wooden debris. The scene then opens into a slightly clearer area where a distant structure emerges through the foliage before Geralt abruptly draws his silver sword and raises it high in preparation for combat.
